name: Mayank
title: Technical Lead – Android
summary: Lead Android Engineer (8+ yrs) specializing in scalable mobile architecture, reliability engineering, and offline-first systems. Led high-impact initiatives supporting products at 2M+ DAU with 99.9% stability.

bullets: Focused on advancing Android architecture, system design, and platform engineering expertise while exploring Senior / Lead Android opportunities.

experience.description: Zupee is a leading casual real money gaming company focused on fun and interactive gaming experiences.
bullets: Led parallel Android initiatives, managing a team of 3 engineers and owning delivery of high-revenue game modules and core platform features end-to-end.
Collaborated with product, design, and backend teams to drive conversion, improve discoverability through A/B testing, and define rollout strategies.
Served as the primary reviewer for all major pull requests due to app-wide context, helping maintain architectural consistency and code quality standards across teams.

Improved gameplay reliability by eliminating critical client-side dependencies, reducing turn timeout failures from ~1.67% to ~1.34% among paid games and minimizing revenue loss from disrupted game sessions.
Built scalable rollout systems using feature flags, A/B tests, and backward-compatible flows.

Led a full app rewrite for the platform's first major brand campaign, adopting a modular, component-based architecture, written in Kotlin using Coroutines and Flow, delivering a phased app release to 100% traffic with 99.92% crash-free stability.
Redesigned tournament architecture with client-side caching and data separation, reducing API load by 70% across high-traffic tournament flows serving 1M+ DAUs.
Redesigned client architecture for offline-first support, eliminating critical WebSocket dependency and enabling uninterrupted user flows during network disruptions.
Improved system resilience during downtime by eliminating socket reconnection spikes, preventing backend overload during high concurrency recovery scenarios.
Built a cache-first authentication and configuration system with TTL-based invalidation, reducing redundant backend calls and improving app launch and interaction latency.
Built an application health engine to monitor gameplay reliability, track user journey failures, and surface operational alerts.
Developed internal automation and platform tooling to reconstruct gameplay state from distributed logs and enable deterministic replay of production game sessions without manual intervention.
Owned and executed a full-scale transformation of a quiz app into an animation-heavy, gamified UX as the sole Android developer.
Built Kotlin and Java-based Android features with a strong focus on UI, UX, and performance, participated in system design, monitored, and resolved production issues.

experience.description: Cliffjumper was an e-commerce company, crafting a unique shopping experience.
bullets: Developed Android interfaces and e-commerce features like product listing, details, cart, order creation, payments page, order tracking.
Integrated REST APIs, Realm DB, push notifications, and deep links while improving app stability through debugging and performance optimization.

achievements.title: Scaled Platform to 2M+ DAUs
achievements.description: Helped scale a small app into a multi-module platform serving 2M+ DAUs through architectural and reliability improvements.

achievements.title: Platform Rewrite & Modernization
achievements.description: Led full-app rewrite adopting new UI theme, modern architecture, SOLID principles, and complete Kotlin migration.

achievements.title: Core Platform Ownership
achievements.description: Architected and scaled core app lifecycle systems — managing platform features and high-revenue game modules end-to-end.

achievements.title: Co-founded Brain Battle
achievements.description: Created and sold a free-to-play multiplayer gaming platform featuring brain-teasers and puzzles to a European startup.

achievements.title: Co-founded Instafeed+
achievements.description: Leveraged technical expertise and passion for innovation to create a product that stood out in a competitive news and magazine market.

achievements.title: 2× Hackathon Winner
achievements.description: Won a bug-bounty hackathon (team of 3) and crafted an AI-based solution to help users navigate a platform with ease (team of 4).
